user_query: I'm writing an article on happiness and need thought-provoking quotes. Can you give me quotes about happiness? Also, provide quotes from different sources like Dalai Lama and Mother Teresa.

TaskList.description: Collect a variety of thought-provoking quotes about happiness from various sources.
Search for quotes specifically from Dalai Lama related to happiness.
Search for quotes specifically from Mother Teresa related to happiness.
Compile and format the collected quotes into a comprehensive list for the article.
